rulings.Case Title: DIANE HALL et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant AmeriGas Propane, L.P.¿s motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is denied. Plaintiffs exercised reasonable diligence in identifying AmeriGas as a defendant in this action. Plaintiffs¿ counsel did not learn of the alleged supply of asbestos blankets and gloves by Victor Welding to decedent, or of the Victor Welding Supply-AmeriGas connection, until the February 2010 conversation with decedent¿s co-worker Rich McLain. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE DUTRA VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Harley-Davidson, Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is off calendar. Harley-Davidson was dismissed on June 8, 2010. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: BARRY HAZEN et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON et al
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Grinnell LLC¿s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. =(220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES MCWILLIAMS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder In Defendant Eaton Electrical Inc., Erroneously Sued Herein As Eaton Corporation As Successor-In-Interest To Cutler-Hammer'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, August 11, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s joinder in defendant Eaton Electrical, Inc.¿s motion to dismiss is off calendar. The case was dismissed in its entirety on July 15, 2010. =(220/HEK)
